title: Innovative Product Feature
scenario: Describe a new innovative feature for a smartwatch. The target artifact is a 50-word text that highlights the feature's benefits and user experience.
constraints: Must use action verbs like 'enables' or 'allows'

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the description is under 50 words and uses action verbs like 'enables' or 'allows'.
Evaluate the tone of the description, ensuring it's professional and engaging.
Verify that the description accurately highlights the feature's benefits and user experience.
